data.name: Bright Lord
data.detailed_description:
加入Discord


關於此遊戲


你不情願地從大學回家，卻因為好心幫忙，與一位名為「光明之主」的古老惡魔起了衝突。光明之主拿下你的身體作為容器，他的要求很簡單：通過打破禁忌，或奪取生命，來滿足他的渴望。

隨著「光明之主」的欲望潛滋暗長，你將面臨難以想像的抉擇，永遠改變你和你周遭的人。當你陷入性愛墮落的無邊深淵時，你會發現，這個活在你腦袋裡的駭人造物將顛覆你的認知。


在《Bright Lord》中，你將扮演一個被遠古惡魔附身的角色，他要求你堅定不移地服從他。你們被捆綁在一起，你們的存亡取決於合作與互助。但在這場鬥爭中，你們是要戰勝挑戰，還是屈服於內心的黑暗？你可以從最親近的人的愛中汲取力量......也可以利用他們，從而獲得你需要的力量。你的選擇將決定未來，但有一點可以肯定：這段旅程將對你的決心進行前所未有的考驗。


你平凡的生活被一股邪惡力量打得支離破碎...

光明之主從何而來？
他真正的潛在能力是什麼？
欲望會摧毀你的抵抗意志嗎？
答案是否如你想像般的那麼近？
你能救下你所愛的人嗎？

你能制止他嗎？你想制止他嗎？


● 超過6000張逼真的遊戲繪製圖。
● 50多段精心挑選的動畫。
● 重要的抉擇： 你的所作作為將決定故事的走向！
● 保護或是毀滅多個獨一無二的角色。
● 在驚心動魄的故事中體驗各種艷遇和可怕的曲折。
● 遊戲內有精美的畫廊，可以讓你重溫最愛的場景。

現在，輪到你了，光明之主將接管你的生命。不得反抗......

data.short_description: 一位古老的惡魔附身於你的軀殼，你平凡的生活被攪得天翻地覆。你被迫充當它的僕人，投身一個充滿性慾和殺戮憤怒的世界。當你所愛之人淪為惡魔飢餓的獵物時，你會保護你的所愛，還是屈服於光明之主的淫慾？
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft® Windows® 7/8/8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.15 or better
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

data.name: Bright Lord
data.detailed_description:
Join the discord


About the Game


A reluctant return from college as a favor puts you on a collision course with an ancient demon known only as the Bright Lord. Using you as his human vessel, the Bright Lord’s request is simple: fuel his craving by breaking taboos or taking lives.

With the Bright Lord’s hunger growing, you will face unthinkable choices, changing you and those around you forever. As you sink into depths of sexual depravity, you learn that nothing is what it seems with the powerful creature living inside your head.


In Bright Lord, you step into the shoes of a character possessed by an ancient demon, demanding unwavering obedience. Bound together, your survival hinges on cooperation and mutual aid. But in this struggle, will you conquer the challenge, or succumb to the darkness within? You can draw strength from the love of those closest to you... or exploit them to gain the power you need. Your choices will shape the future, but one thing is certain: the journey will test your resolve like never before.


Your ordinary life is shattered by a sinister force...

Where did the Bright Lord come from?
What is his true potential?
Will your lust break your will to resist?
Were the answers much closer than you thought?
Can you save those you love?

Can you resist him? Do you want to?


● More than 6000 lifelike renders.
● A selection of 50+ animations.
● High-stakes decisions: Your choices shape the story!
● Multiple unique characters to protect or corrupt.
● A thrilling narrative packed with erotic encounters and horrific twists and turns.
● An entire gallery to revisit your favorite scenes.

Now, it’s your turn to have the Bright Lord overtake your life. Don’t dare to resist…

data.short_description: Your mundane life is upended when an ancient demon possesses your body. Forced to work as its servant, you’re thrust into a world of sexual desire and murderous wrath. When your loved ones fall prey to the demon’s hunger, will you protect those you care for or succumb to lust of the Bright Lord?
data.supported_languages: English, French, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Turkish
